description_long: This is a two-story modern house surrounded by a neatly trimmed hedge and paved pathways. The exterior walls are light gray with large, rectangular windows on both floors, allowing ample natural light inside. The front features an arched entryway and a set of double-height windows, while the backyard includes a small swimming pool, patio area, and lush landscaping with trees and shrubs. The flat roof sections are partially green, suggesting rooftop gardens or terraces. The property is enclosed by a hedge fence with a wooden gate, and the overall layout is open and inviting. The house is situated on a rectangular lot with a mix of hardscape and softscape elements.
description: A modern two-story house with large windows, flat roofs, and a landscaped yard featuring a pool and patio, all enclosed by a hedge fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the arched entryway, large windows, and green rooftop areas, with the hedge fence and gate visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the upper floor windows, backyard landscaping, and the pool area partially visible behind the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pool, patio, and lush garden, with the back facade's large windows and hedge enclosure.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the side entry, green rooftop, and a clear view of the pool and garden area within the fenced yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Arched main entryway with a recessed door, no porch, and minimal decorative elements
